title: sdf.generation.completed v1
description: Emitted at the end of each SDF FunSearch generation. Source: /autobench/sdf_kernel. Includes eikonal-penalised fitness (fitness = (1/(1+MSE)) * exp(-0.5*grad_err)) and diversity diagnostics.

best_fitness.description: Best eikonal-penalised fitness this generation: (1/(1+MSE)) * exp(-0.5*grad_err). 1.0 = perfect eikonal-valid SDF.

fitness_std.description: Standard deviation of fitness across all island populations.

code_diversity.description: Mean pairwise Jaccard distance of code token sets (0=identical, 1=disjoint).

island_reset_fired.description: True if island_reset() culled weak islands this generation.
